c.d: The number and diversity of effects and filters available within the app to alter the look and feel of photos.
How easy and intuitive the app is to use, including the placement of tools and navigation.
The degree to which effects and filters can be adjusted or modified to achieve a specific look.
The platforms (iOS, Android, Web) on which the app is available.
The pricing model of the app, including whether it is free, has in-app purchases, or requires a subscription.
